1.0.2.headline: A more capable canvas
1.0.2.summary: New navigation, grouping, and alignment tools make arranging references faster.

new.title: Hand tool and reworked toolbar
new.description: Move around the canvas with a dedicated Hand tool and open creation tools from the new Add drawer.

new.title: Visible group names
new.description: Group labels now appear above grouped items so boards stay easier to understand.

new.title: In-app release highlights
new.description: See what changed in RefBoard directly from the landing page after an update.

improved.title: Faster selection alignment
improved.description: Align and normalize tools now use clearer icons in the selection bar.

1.0.3.headline: Safer sessions, smoother boards
1.0.3.summary: RefBoard restores work more reliably while using less memory on large boards.

improved.title: Automatic session restore
improved.description: Your board returns automatically when RefBoard reopens.

improved.title: Faster canvas navigation
improved.description: Zooming and panning stay responsive on boards with many images.

improved.title: Lower memory usage
improved.description: Large boards now consume significantly less memory.

fixed.title: Images stay on the correct board
fixed.description: References from one board no longer occasionally appear in another.

fixed.title: Corrupted files open safely
fixed.description: Opening a damaged board no longer wipes the board already open.

1.0.4.headline: Sharper exports
1.0.4.summary: Copied and exported images now preserve their intended quality.

fixed.title: Crisp copied and exported images
fixed.description: Images no longer come out blurry after copying or exporting.

1.0.5.headline: Notes that feel natural
1.0.5.summary: Editing notes is more direct, with cleaner links, lists, and cursor behavior.

improved.title: Readable links while editing
improved.description: Notes show clickable link text instead of raw Markdown.

improved.title: Direct cursor placement
improved.description: Click anywhere in a note to place the cursor exactly there.

improved.title: Cleaner pasted content
improved.description: Checkboxes render properly, and pasted content keeps bullets from ChatGPT and the web.

fixed.title: Consistent note layout
fixed.description: Text alignment, spacing, and sizing issues in notes are resolved.

1.0.6.headline: A refreshed RefBoard
1.0.6.summary: A new identity and File Explorer previews make RefBoard feel at home on Windows.

new.title: New app icon
new.description: RefBoard has a refreshed visual identity across the app.

new.title: File Explorer previews
new.description: Saved RefBoard files now display a board thumbnail in File Explorer.

1.1.0.headline: A stronger everyday workflow
1.1.0.summary: This release brings better previews, cleaner notes, smarter pasting, and lower memory use.

new.title: File Explorer board thumbnails
new.description: Identify saved RefBoard files from their preview before opening them.

improved.title: More natural note editing
improved.description: Place the cursor with a click, use cleaner lists and checkboxes, and read links as clickable text.

improved.title: Smarter copy and paste
improved.description: Groups remain intact and pasted images arrive as individual references.

improved.title: Lower large-board memory use
improved.description: Image-heavy boards now use less system memory.

fixed.title: Smoother everyday navigation
fixed.description: Resolved the save prompt after export, landing-page wheel scrolling, and several zoom glitches.

1.1.1.headline: Faster, safer saves
1.1.1.summary: Large boards now save, reopen, and switch more reliably with lower peak memory use.

improved.title: Atomic board saves
improved.description: Boards write to a temporary file first, so a failed save cannot damage the existing file.

improved.title: Much faster large-board saves
improved.description: A 22 MB board can now save in well under a second.

improved.title: Lower copy memory use
improved.description: Copying large selections requires far less memory.

improved.title: Instant reopen for the active board
improved.description: Opening the board already in use no longer reloads or decodes its images.

improved.title: Earlier memory release
improved.description: Switching boards frees old image data sooner and lowers peak usage.

fixed.title: Reliable close and Home actions
fixed.description: Timed-out saves keep the board open instead of leaving RefBoard hanging.

fixed.title: Clean File Explorer thumbnails
fixed.description: The duplicate R logo is gone; the preview badge appears once in the bottom-right corner.

1.1.2.headline: More control from canvas to export
1.1.2.summary: High-resolution crops, drawing shortcuts, batch naming, and disk-backed loading expand the creative workflow.

new.title: Full-resolution cropped exports
new.description: Export only the visible crop while preserving the source image resolution.

new.title: Drawing keyboard shortcuts
new.description: Press E for the eraser, or use [ and ] to change pen thickness.

new.title: Normalize by width or height
new.description: Match selected images by a shared dimension instead of scale alone.

new.title: Flexible batch export names
new.description: Number exports in order with padded digits or keep original file names.

improved.title: Exact crop dimensions
improved.description: The export dialog shows the precise pixel size of the cropped result.

improved.title: Disk-backed image streaming
improved.description: Large boards load faster and use less memory.

fixed.title: Cleaner landing-page thumbnails
fixed.description: Stray black blocks no longer appear in board previews.

fixed.title: Stable notes and groups at extreme zoom
fixed.description: Note cursor behavior and group rendering remain reliable far in or out.

1.1.3.headline: Sharper at every zoom
1.1.3.summary: This update focuses on image stability and smoother rendering.

fixed.title: Consistent image sharpness
fixed.description: Images remain crisp while zooming in and out.

fixed.title: Seamless quality switching
fixed.description: References change rendering quality without visibly popping.

2.0.0.headline: Introducing Animatics
2.0.0.summary: RefBoard 2.0 turns your reference boards into motion, with a redesigned interface and a whole new way to work.

new.title: Animatics timeline
new.description: Turn references into motion with a layered timeline, audio tracks, and precise in/out controls.

new.title: Export to Premiere & After Effects
new.description: Hand off your animatic straight to your editing and compositing workflow.

new.title: Themes
new.description: Personalize RefBoard's look with a refreshed, themeable interface.

improved.title: Redesigned interface
improved.description: A cleaner, more focused workspace across the board and landing screens.

improved.title: Board Save As
improved.description: Save a copy of any board without overwriting your original.
